channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: Summer 2026 Dining & Retail Hours Starting May 18th, 2026
item.description: Summer 2026 is coming up fast click the link above for everything you need to know about the dining and retail hours on campus during the summer semester.
item.author: Community

item.title: Graduate Certificate Review
item.description: Date: Wednesday, May 20, 2026 12:00 PM - 12:30 PM - Join RPI at Work Dean Aric Krause, Ph.D., in a 30-minute information session highlighting the whole range of RPI’s online, project-based graduate certificate programs. These certificates are three courses in length, developing targeted ability groups, and can be completed in as little as seven months. Please RSVP if you plan to attend.
item.author: Community

item.title: Make the Most of Your CDPHP Fitness Reimbursement – Capital Region Basketball Camp at RPI
item.description:
Registration is open for The Capital Region Basketball Camp for youth at RPI, led by Mark Gilbride, Head Men’s Basketball Coach. CDPHP members can submit a fitness reimbursement request via their member account online.

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Faculty and Staff
